security.item: Included a form token in the template file and added CSRF verification inside the Ajax function.

fix.item:
Added 
$app = Factory::getApplication();
at the beginning of the Ajax function to avoid creating multiple application instances unnecessarily.

Used the 
dataset
variable in JavaScript instead of 
getAttribute()
to select the form.
Included the Item ID as a hidden form input so the Ajax function can correctly load module parameters when assigned to specific menu items.

addition.item:
Added return type 
array
to protected function 
getLayoutData(): array
.

Added intermediate variable 
$options
when merging options from the form definition XML.

Used intermediate variable 
$document
inside the template file.
Added changelogurl tag to the extension manifest XML so extension versions link to changelogs in the Joomla manage view.
Added module ID as a hidden input in the form to simplify JavaScript data retrieval.
Added method and module ID variables to Ajax error message output for clearer debugging.

change.item: Removed author URL from the manifest file.
Standardized ordering of manifest file elements.
Removed the element tag from the manifest file since the name tag value is cleaned and used automatically.
Changed update info URL, simplified version restrictions, and added changelog URL to the update server file.

fix.item: Fixed bug where GDPR text was not appearing.

change.item: Bumped version from 1.6 to 1.6.1.

addition.item: Moved frontend JavaScript into a separate media file.
Created external JavaScript submit script in media directory.
Implemented Joomla Web Asset Manager for JavaScript assets.
Implemented auto-populate of Mailchimp list field.
Added language string for missing API key.

change.item: Changed language string to remove colon after e-mail address.
Changed update server to reflect latest release.
Moved params retrieval into the template file.
Loaded external script inside template file and passed variables from PHP to JavaScript instead of using inline JavaScript.
Standardized manifest file formatting.
Updated manifest file for JavaScript media.
Updated PHP file versions to 1.6.
Updated helper file to handle Mailchimp list ID errors.
Modified List ID language key.
Updated README documentation.

fix.item: Used Factory::getApplication()->enqueueMessage for installer script messages.
Checked and removed or modified unused language strings.

addition.item: Added try/catch block for initial Mailchimp initialization.

change.item: Removed surrounding div from form submit button.
Changed "users" to "contacts" inside comments to reflect Mailchimp terminology.
Optimized loading of language strings.

fix.item: Fixed statement that loads language strings.
Fixed improper French language string during installation.
Improved handling of already subscribed contact statuses.
Fixed issue where error or success messages were not showing.
Implemented a more robust and secure message handling method using programmatically created elements and appended text nodes.

change.item: Moved empty index.html files to correct directories.

fix.item: Fixed incorrect version in manifest file.

change.item: Reduced use of session variables by loading module inside the helper file.

addition.item: Initial release of Sign Up Chimp module.
